title: ConvertKit vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit and Moosend email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your business needs.
intro: ConvertKit and Moosend are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences. ConvertKit focuses on creators and course sellers with built-in commerce features, while Moosend emphasizes affordability and unlimited emails for small businesses. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize creator-focused tools or low-cost scaling.
choose_a_if: You're a creator, blogger, or online course seller needing built-in commerce features
You want visual automation workflows designed specifically for creators
You prioritize ease of use and creator-focused functionality over lowest price
choose_b_if: You need the lowest entry price for paid email marketing ($9/month)
Unlimited emails per month are critical for your email strategy
You're a small business focused on marketing automation and analytics

faq.a: Neither is objectively 'better'—it depends on your needs. ConvertKit excels for creators with e-commerce needs and superior user experience, while Moosend wins on price and unlimited email sending. Moosend has higher ratings on G2 (4.7 vs 4.4) and Trustpilot (4.4 vs 3.2), suggesting strong overall satisfaction.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to ConvertKit's $29/month. Additionally, Moosend includes unlimited emails on all plans, while ConvertKit restricts email volume by tier. For budget-conscious small businesses, Moosend offers better value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber list, making migration possible. Most email marketing tools support CSV imports, so transferring your contacts and automation workflows between platforms is straightforward, though you may need to manually recreate complex automations.
